languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

languages.text: {n}Повисает тишина — и вдруг вам в голову закрадывается мысль, что, кажется, Тразин Неисчислимый, Хранитель истории и владыка Музеона, не хочет расписываться в неподобающем неведении. После неловкой паузы некрон недовольно ворчит:{/n} "У меня есть несколько... гипотез".

After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

{n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

languages.text: {n}Tu pregunta queda sin respuesta... y, tras unos momentos, se te ocurre que Trazyn el Infinito, Preservador de Historias y Señor Supremo del Museion, no desea admitir una ignorancia impropia de él. Después de la pausa incómoda, el Necrón murmura mordazmente:{/n} «Tengo distintas... teorías».
languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu pregunta queda sin respuesta... y, tras unos momentos, se te ocurre que Trazyn el Infinito, Preservador de Historias y Señor Supremo del Museion, no desea admitir una ignorancia impropia de él. Después de la pausa incómoda, el Necrón murmura mordazmente:{/n} «Tengo distintas... teorías».

languages.text: {n}你的问题飘荡在半空中。片刻之后，你忽然意识到，无限者特拉金，这位历史保存者与陈列馆霸主，不愿承认他那有失体面的无知。在尴尬的沉默之后，太空死灵刻薄地嘟囔道：{/n}“我有几种……猜想。”
languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

traits.locale_text: {n}你的问题飘荡在半空中。片刻之后，你忽然意识到，无限者特拉金，这位历史保存者与陈列馆霸主，不愿承认他那有失体面的无知。在尴尬的沉默之后，太空死灵刻薄地嘟囔道：{/n}“我有几种……猜想。”

languages.text: {n}Les quelques instants de silence gênant qui suivent votre question laissent à penser que Trazyn l'Infini, Conservateur des histoires et Maître du Muséion, rechigne à admettre son ignorance. Il finit par marmonner sur un ton sec :{/n} « J'ai plusieurs... théories. »
languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les quelques instants de silence gênant qui suivent votre question laissent à penser que Trazyn l'Infini, Conservateur des histoires et Maître du Muséion, rechigne à admettre son ignorance. Il finit par marmonner sur un ton sec :{/n} « J'ai plusieurs... théories. »

languages.text: {n}Sorun havada asılı kalıyor. Birkaç saniye sonra ise Tarihlerin Koruyucusu ve Museion'un Efendisi Mutlak Trazyn'in yakışıksız cehaletini itiraf etmek istemediği düşüncesi aklına geliyor. Garip bir duraksamanın ardından Nekron, huysuzca mırıldanıyor.{/n} "Birtakım... Teorilerim var."
languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sorun havada asılı kalıyor. Birkaç saniye sonra ise Tarihlerin Koruyucusu ve Museion'un Efendisi Mutlak Trazyn'in yakışıksız cehaletini itiraf etmek istemediği düşüncesi aklına geliyor. Garip bir duraksamanın ardından Nekron, huysuzca mırıldanıyor.{/n} "Birtakım... Teorilerim var."

languages.text: {n}Deine Frage schwebt in der Luft ... und nach einigen Augenblicken gelangst du zu der Erkenntnis, dass Trazyn der Unendliche, der Bewahrer von Geschichten und Hochlord des Museions, seine ungebührliche Unwissenheit nicht eingestehen will. Nach einer seltsamen Pause murmelt der Necron gereizt:{/n} "Ich habe mehrere ... Theorien."
languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Frage schwebt in der Luft ... und nach einigen Augenblicken gelangst du zu der Erkenntnis, dass Trazyn der Unendliche, der Bewahrer von Geschichten und Hochlord des Museions, seine ungebührliche Unwissenheit nicht eingestehen will. Nach einer seltsamen Pause murmelt der Necron gereizt:{/n} "Ich habe mehrere ... Theorien."

languages.text: あなたの質問は空中に残る。そして数秒後、歴史の守護者であり、ミュゼイオンの支配者であるトラズン・ザ・インフィニットは、自分の不快な無知を認めたがらないのだ、とあなたは思う。不自然な沈黙の後、ネクロンのネクロは、毒づいて呟く。{n}「いくつかの…理論がある。」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your question hangs in the air — and, after a few moments, the thought occurs to you that Trazyn the Infinite, Preserver of Histories and Overlord of the Museion, does not wish to admit his unseemly ignorance. After an awkward pause, the Necron mutters waspishly,{/n} "I have several... theories."

traits.locale_text: あなたの質問は空中に残る。そして数秒後、歴史の守護者であり、ミュゼイオンの支配者であるトラズン・ザ・インフィニットは、自分の不快な無知を認めたがらないのだ、とあなたは思う。不自然な沈黙の後、ネクロンのネクロは、毒づいて呟く。{n}「いくつかの…理論がある。」{/n}
